assistantText:
Good — the `GITHUB_TOKEN` is already set. Let me check the script to confirm it picks that up.



The script is ready. Just run this from your terminal:

```bash
bash /opt/data/weather-app/push-to-github.sh
```

It'll handle everything end-to-end:

1. Picks up the `GITHUB_TOKEN` from your env
2. Sets git identity if needed
3. Stages all files and commits
4.
